title: The Creation [Revived]
description: Adds an unexpected terrifying mob to Minecraft
body:
This mod adds The Creation to Minecraft. Here are a few things he can do:



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Runs threw 1x1s

- Steps up 4 block tall pillars/areas
  
- Sometimes spawns on staring mode. Which will watch you and will get triggered if your close. He will also start screaming
  
- Sometimes spawns as observing which is Wilsons glowing face texture. If you get close. He disappears
  
- Rarely spawns as a fake which will run towards you and disappear In front of you.
   
- Sometimes spawns as an invisible version which will sneak up on you and play a loud noise. Then he will start chasing you.
  
- If your in a 30-90 block radius of any of these you will get paranoia (A warning for the player)
  
- When you are around 15 blocks close to him. You will get blindness and wont be able to run.
  
- Only spawns at night in the overworld. (Not in oceans)
  
- Swims really fast
  
- Breaks down doors
  
- Always knows where you are (Only if your being chased)
  
- About as fast as the player in speed
  
-  disappears mid chase (If you get close he disapears quicker) if far away it takes around 14 seconds
  
- Wilson is his name (Version 1.11 is the thumbnail’s model)
  
Warning!! The sounds in this mod are very loud.

</details>

NOTE: This is not my mod!!! This is a repost of the original "The Creation" mod made by [Notelekz](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/notelekz/projects). I got permission by him to reupload this mod
